overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street with neon signs, holographic advertisements, and towering glass buildings. The atmosphere is hazy with wet reflective surfaces, scattered pedestrians carrying umbrellas, and a distinctive yellow-green color grading throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown intersection with neon signage

events.description: camera turns left to follow the sidewalk along the main street
pedestrians with umbrellas cross the wet street ahead at the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the rain-soaked sidewalk of a cyberpunk street, observing neon signs and holographic advertisements on surrounding buildings

notable_agents.action: person holding a blue umbrella crossing the street ahead
dark van driving down the wet street with headlights on

entered.detail: large cyan neon arrow signs pointing left mounted on the building facade
multi-story glass building covered in holographic advertisements and billboards
black metal lamp post with traffic lights and pedestrian signals
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing painted on wet asphalt
tall palm tree growing from sidewalk planter

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked sidewalk in a dense cyberpunk city intersection, passing neon signs and holographic advertisements while pedestrians with umbrellas navigate the wet crosswalks. The atmosphere is thick with yellowish haze as artificial lights reflect off the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk between industrial buildings with overhead walkways

events.description: large black cargo truck passes by on the right side of the sidewalk
moving from open intersection into enclosed street section beneath building overhangs

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk as a large truck passes by closely on the right, moving into a more enclosed and darker street section

notable_agents.action: large black cargo truck driving slowly past the sidewalk on the wet street

entered.detail: metal pedestrian bridge connecting buildings overhead with railings
large circular metal ventilation fans mounted on building facade
large green industrial dumpster positioned on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Moving into a narrower street section sheltered by building overhangs, passing a large industrial truck and walking beneath overhead walkways. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed with industrial ventilation units visible on the building facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital advertising screens

events.description: emerging from dark underpass into brighter area illuminated by the YAIBA building signage
camera tilts upward to look at the top of the massive YAIBA glass tower

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered section with digital billboards, then approaching and looking up at the massive YAIBA building

notable_agents.action: person standing near digital advertising kiosk looking at the screen

entered.detail: massive glass skyscraper with large illuminated cyan YAIBA signage near the base
large wall with multiple screens showing vehicle advertisements
tall vertical digital screen displaying animated advertisements on the sidewalk
concrete stairs leading up to building entrance with metal railings

segments.scene_description: Approaching the massive YAIBA glass tower, walking past digital advertising kiosks and billboards displaying vehicle advertisements. The camera tilts upward to take in the full height of the skyscraper as the surroundings open up slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with crosswalks and heavy signage

events.description: crossing the wide street at the yellow striped crosswalk
turning slightly right while continuing down the street past road barriers

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while futuristic vehicles approach, then continuing down the street past barriers

notable_agents.action: futuristic car with headlights on approaching the intersection slowly

entered.detail: yellow striped pedestrian crossing with WAIT X markings painted on the asphalt
red and white striped plastic barriers lining the edge of the street

segments.scene_description: Crossing a wide intersection with yellow striped crosswalks, passing road barriers and outdoor stairs while futuristic vehicles navigate the wet streets. The YAIBA building remains visible in the distance as the camera moves through the open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with storefronts and neon signage

events.description: entering open plaza area from the narrow street section

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza past various storefronts with vibrant purple and cyan neon signs

notable_agents.action: person with distinctive red hair walking past a storefront

entered.detail: building facade with large purple neon cat-like symbol and VISTA signage above entrance
multiple large digital screens above entrance showing various advertisements

segments.scene_description: Entering an open plaza lined with storefronts featuring vibrant purple and cyan neon signage, including a distinctive purple neon symbol. The area is less crowded with wet tiled surfaces reflecting the colorful artificial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk district that shifts from a dense, hazy intersection into a wide, neon-lit plaza. It begins by navigating a crowded sidewalk amidst holographic advertisements and pedestrians with umbrellas, where artificial lights shimmer on the wet pavement through a thick yellowish haze. As the camera moves forward, the environment becomes darker and more enclosed, passing under building overhangs and overhead walkways beside industrial ventilation units and a large truck. The scene then opens up as the camera approaches the massive YAIBA glass tower, tilting upward to capture the skyscraper's height before crossing a wide intersection filled with futuristic vehicles and yellow striped crosswalks. Finally, the movement leads into an open plaza where the lighting shifts to vibrant purple and cyan neon signage reflecting off wet tiled surfaces.
